chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D – 1787 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.31340/2014 2. For orders on CMA No.31341/2014 3. For hearing of CMA NO.6599/2015 4. For hearing of main case 11.10.2022 Mr. Sarfraz A. Akhund, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, Advocate for respondent No.5 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> Learned counsel for the petitioners states that so far the grievance of the petitioners agitated in this petition is concerned, the same has been redressed by virtue of Notification dated 28.07.2021 whereby the Board of Governors of Public School Sukkur has been reconstituted, hence, he does not press this petition further; however, the petitioners reserve their right to challenge the Agreement executed between Commissioner / Chairman Board of Governors Public School Sukkur Division and Mr. Nisar Ahmed Siddiqui, Director, Sukkur IBA dated 04.11.2012 available at Annexure ‘G’ page-61 in view of the decision on divergent / fresh cause of action. Accordingly, the instant petition stands disposed of. The petitioner, however, are at liberty to file afresh petition challenging the alleged Agreement, if so advised, in accordance with law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
